---
title: "Organisers"
---

::: {.container-narrow}

## Organising committee

::: {.organiser-grid}

::: {.organiser-card}
![](assets/img/organisers/dario-righelli.svg){.organiser-photo fig-alt="Dario Righelli"}

### Dario Righelli  
**University of Cambridge / University of Padova**
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
![](assets/img/organisers/cristian-taccioli.svg){.organiser-photo fig-alt="Cristian Taccioli"}

### Cristian Taccioli  
**University of Cambridge / University of Padova**
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
![](assets/img/organisers/pietro-lio.svg){.organiser-photo fig-alt="Pietro Liò"}

### Pietro Liò  
**University of Cambridge**
:::

:::

:::
